metric_caveats: This 25-record cap compares Gemini verify-repair v2 against Gemini direct and GPT 4.1-mini verify-repair v2 on matched records.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
Verifier decisions (confirm/repair/abstain) and reasons are preserved in prediction metadata.
Artifact-bridge surface normalization is applied identically across compared variants.
Do not claim primary-model candidacy until evidence support and full-scale behavior are confirmed.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
